# Cmas

**Summary**: A stochastic optimization algorithm used to find optimal parameters in complex reservoir systems.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2013-ahmed|AHMED, 2013]] used CMAES to optimize surfactant and polymer concentrations and well placement for both NPV and UR objectives.

## Key Results and Findings

- CMAES showed higher values of UR than DE and IWO in best and worst realizations for Reservoir Model-1. ([[2013-ahmed|AHMED, 2013, p. 122]])
